meta.description: Hand-authored chapter slice world, player, item, skill, and state definitions.

items.name: 路引
items.description: 盖有楼桑印记的出村路引，守门兵验过后才会放行。

items.name: Herb
items.description: Restores a small amount of HP.

items.name: Bandage
items.description: Field dressing packed for patrol and camp duty.

items.name: Bronze Sword
items.description: A simple bronze blade issued to outpost recruits.

items.name: 渡口文符
items.description: 渡口文吏发出的通行文符，守兵验过后才会放行。

items.name: 行军口粮
items.description: 山道行军时发下来的干粮包，能在长途推进前补充体力。

items.name: 山道符牌
items.description: 前营文书盖印的山道符牌，山口守兵验过后才会放行。

items.name: 驿路铜牌
items.description: 山道传令兵发出的铜牌，驿门守将验过后才会放行。
